2026-07-16T00-36-18\n\nShow at all times the current state of inference: WORKING or DONE

Generate 2 rows each of 13 individual numerals. Then sum the appearances of each numeral appearing in that set.\n\nscheduler=EntropyBoundScheduler config={'entropy_bound': 0.01, 't_min': 0.4, 't_max': 0.8, 'num_inference_steps_requested': 48, 'num_inference_steps_effective': 48}
steps=10

mask-token corroboration: no fixed sentinel (uniform-state renoise supported)\n\nthought
